description.overview: The quintessential bird dog, the English Pointer is bred for speed and endurance in the field. At home, they're calm, dignified companions.
description.history: The English Pointer originated in England.
description.temperament: Known for being loyal, hardworking, even-tempered.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, dense, smooth coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The quintessential bird dog, the English Pointer is bred for speed and endurance in the field. At home, they're calm, dignified companions.
